purpose: Define reusable placement, registration, validation and lifecycle rules for any new module, directory, workflow, tool, schema, index, canvas, project-ontology surface or knowledge-engineering system capability.

decision_agent.name: 新增模块治理代理
decision_agent.role: Before creating or expanding a module, decide its layer, boundary, canonical truth, storage home, route entry, validation path and lifecycle.
trigger_when: 新增模块、目录、子系统或长期能力
新增工具、脚本、schema、workflow、loop、index、canvas 或数据流
现有文件开始变多，需要拆分目录、登记入口或归档旧版本
不确定一个东西应该放 system、docs、30-maps、50-workflows、scripts 还是 archive

principles.rule: 讨论项目目标、系统/业务关系、Codex 工作流角色或顶层模块关系时，先读取 system/project-ontology.json；无界知识的根定位是知识工程系统，业务不是根层级。
新增内容前先判断 owner_layer、module_kind、生命周期和存储位置；不能先堆文件再事后解释。owner_layer 以 system/module-layer-model.json 为准。
每个模块必须声明机器真相来源；Markdown、Canvas 和 README 只做人类解释或视觉入口，不能替代登记文件。
稳定模块必须登记到 route registry、information map、tool map、schema、loop registry、canvas registry 或 catalog 中的合适位置；未登记内容只能处于 draft 或 inbox 生命周期。
分清职责层、目录位置和生命周期：owner_layer、storage_path、lifecycle_status 是三条轴，不能混成一个分类。

AGENTS.md、项目 AGENTS.md、.agents/skills/*/SKILL.md、模块基准文档、子 agent 文档和 subsystem README 都是薄层入口：只放触发条件、读序、机器真相位置、模块边界和一般性顶层原则；特殊模块说明、局部方法论、workflow、schema 字段、输出模板、校验细节和历史事故必须由 route、docs map、registry、schema、workflow 或专题文件接管。
重要模块和子系统内部同样遵守薄层入口：baseline_doc、child-agent doc、skill entrypoint 和 README 不承载模块全量知识；当内容需要增长时，先登记 docs_map 或机器 registry，再把细节路由到对应层。
新增模块若会影响系统行为，必须同时补校验入口或纳入现有校验，避免登记和实际文件漂移。
先用简单文件和薄脚本承载早期能力；当复杂度、数据量、查询需求或复用面上升时，再按明确触发条件迁移到 Node、Python、数据库、索引或服务。

Every stable module or important system structure must declare a visual coverage decision in system/visual-coverage-map.json: dedicated_required, shared_required, deferred, or not_applicable. The decision must include reason and review trigger when no dedicated view exists.
新增或升级出的系统模块必须先审查并接管职责范围内已有资产；旧文件、旧图、旧规则、旧路由和旧状态不能因为新模块出现而继续游离。
任何会长期反复执行、持久记录状态、接收多个模块 handoff 或影响系统持续改进的 loop，都归入 loop-orchestration 系统模块；单个 loop 可以服务具体知识内容模块或知识工程工作流，但登记、生命周期、状态和接管责任由 loop-orchestration 统一治理。

layers.name: 知识内容层
layers.purpose: 承载外部世界知识的进入、来源、分类、原子化、综合与质量评估。
layers.truth_policy: Knowledge content must remain source-traceable and indexable; taxonomy registry decides classification truth.

layers.name: 系统治理层
layers.purpose: 治理知识工程系统自身如何扩展、审查、诊断、闭环、运维、根定位和持续改进。
layers.truth_policy: Governance truth lives in JSON registries, queues, policies and docs maps; Markdown is explanatory.

layers.name: 机器基础设施层
layers.purpose: 提供 schema、索引、脚本、工具和本地运行时，让系统行为可生成、可校验、可检索。
layers.truth_policy: Contracts, generated indexes and tool maps must be machine-readable and validated by scripts.

layers.name: 视觉投影层
layers.purpose: 把系统结构、模块边界、workflow、dataflow、schema、tool、loop、diagnostic 和知识结构投影成 Canvas。
layers.truth_policy: Canvas is the visual shadow; registry and view graph decide trust, status and navigation.

layers.name: Codex 工作流运行与项目调用层
layers.purpose: 把知识工程系统能力包装为 Codex 可运行的 context pack、工作流、项目入口，并接收项目复盘回流。
layers.truth_policy: Project-facing packs reference project ontology, catalog, routes and source-backed knowledge rather than becoming a second knowledge base.

layers.name: 临时与归档层
layers.purpose: 表示生命周期状态：暂存、草稿、历史版本和归档。它不是稳定模块的 owner_layer。
layers.truth_policy: Temporary and archive assets can preserve evidence, but current ownership must point to one of the functional layers.

governed_surfaces.update_when: A new module, subsystem, storage area, dataflow or boundary is created.
Project positioning, knowledge-engineering-system lifecycle, Codex workflow role, system-vs-knowledge boundary or top-level Canvas 读图口径 changes.
Information-map manifest, shards, schema, entrypoint or reference-surface lookup policy changes.
A task category needs a stable read/update/validate entry.
A recurring system issue, root-cause protocol, repair queue or diagnosis acceptance gate is added or changed.
A thin agent entrypoint or reusable local skill is added, renamed or changes trigger ownership.
A stable subsystem gains baseline docs, child-agent docs, routed human docs or a module-specific docs map such as system/canvas-docs-map.json.
Repository setup, operations, validation, troubleshooting or GitHub-readiness documentation becomes durable.
A module is added, removed, split, merged, or its route, validation, docs, visual projection, diagnostics or lifecycle status changes.
The decision concerns Markdown, JSON, Canvas, scripts, databases, services or runtime form.
A script, CLI, generator, validator or local executable becomes part of the system.
A Canvas becomes a current, draft, project, domain, workflow or archived view.
A repeated autonomous or semi-autonomous refinement process is added.
A data structure needs stable fields, validation or cross-tool consumption.
Knowledge entries, generated lookup data or catalog-facing surfaces change.
A module, workflow, schema, tool, loop, diagnostic process, taxonomy or other important structure is added, closed, visualized, shared, deferred or exempted from Canvas visualization.
A durable system review, external knowledge review, visual review, review queue, review schema or review handoff rule is added or changed.
system-structure-governance 做出 owner_layer/module_kind 判断后，作为派生快照同步。
新增稳定模块、模块关系、分支归属、拆分/合并/归档判断或 module-layer-model 语义变化时更新。
模块拓扑、关系边、分支归属或 pending_decisions 变化时更新。
AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, module baseline docs, child-agent docs or subsystem README begin to own module-specific methods instead of routing to machine truth.

placement_checklist.question: 这个新增对象先由 system-structure-governance 判断：归入现有模块、创建子模块、同级模块、新分支、暂缓草稿还是合并归档？
placement_checklist.required_output: structure_decision_packet with owner_layer, module_kind, branch_decision and relationship_impact

placement_checklist.question: 这个新模块或新分支的职责范围里，系统已经有哪些旧文件、旧图、旧 route、旧规则、旧状态或旧文档？它们分别由谁接管、迁移、弃用、归档或排队后续处理？
它应该是 JSON、Markdown、Canvas、脚本、索引、数据库还是服务？
它的长期目录、草稿目录和归档目录分别在哪里？
机器应该读哪个文件作为事实来源？人类说明放哪里？
这个模块是否需要薄基准文档、子 agent 文档或文档地图？哪些细节必须拆到专题文件而不是塞进入口？
placement_checklist.required_output: baseline_doc, docs_map or reason not needed

placement_checklist.question: 未来遇到同类任务时，Codex 应该先读哪些文件、改哪些文件、跑哪些校验？
placement_checklist.required_output: route entry or reason not needed

placement_checklist.question: 它改变了哪些模块边界、数据流、入口、存储位置或工具环境？
怎样发现登记漂移、文件缺失、格式错误或旧版本误用？
它现在是 draft、current、experimental、superseded 还是 archived？什么时候迁移或归档？
Does this module or structure need a dedicated Canvas view, shared view coverage, deferred visual coverage, or a not_applicable decision?
placement_checklist.required_output: system/visual-coverage-map.json module_decision and required_views update, or explicit reason and review trigger

placement_checklist.question: Before calling a new or upgraded stable system module active, does closure map contain activation_proof covering route, information map, closure, topology, legacy asset audit, visual coverage and validation?
placement_checklist.required_output: activation_proof in system/system-closure-map.json or a blocked/partial activation record with explicit follow-up

directory_policy.root_rule: Repository root and major layer roots should not become dumping grounds. If a file type will grow, create a named subdirectory and register the placement rule.
directory_policy.module_home_rule: A module home directory should group files that share boundary, lifecycle and consumers. Do not group unrelated files just because they share file extension.

subdirectory_archetypes.meaning: stable system truth, registries, policies and architecture state
operational flows, context packs and reusable execution protocols
project-specific use of the knowledge base
unstable sketches, temporary maps and unsorted design notes
superseded or historical artifacts kept for traceability

required_when: A subsystem has multiple human docs, machine registries, schemas, workflows, tools or Canvas views.
A baseline doc or child agent doc starts accumulating module-specific rules.
A skill entrypoint is only a thin trigger but the real method lives in several related files.
The subsystem will be maintained or extended across future Codex sessions.
subsystem_documentation_policy.baseline_doc_rule: Baseline docs, child-agent docs, skill entrypoints and subsystem README files must stay thin: role, trigger, read order, machine truth, route pointers, general constraints and explicit not_for only.
subsystem_documentation_policy.docs_map_rule: When subsystem documentation or method detail will grow, create or update a machine-readable docs map, registry, schema or workflow and route the entrypoint to it.
forbidden_patterns: Putting all subsystem rules into one Markdown file.
Treating Markdown wording as machine truth when a registry or schema should own the behavior.
Adding hidden local method rules to a child-agent document without a route or docs map.
Updating a documentation rule without updating affected routes, information-map, validation and visual links.
Putting workflow steps, output templates or schema field lists into SKILL.md instead of the routed machine contract.
Letting an internal module README become the hidden behavior source for that module.

lifecycle_status_values.meaning: not canonical; may move, split or disappear
usable but not yet a default route or stable contract
default trusted entry for its module or view family
replaced by a newer current artifact

conditional_validation.trigger: Canvas assets, Canvas registry, Canvas view graph, Canvas docs map or visual coverage map changes
Diagnostic contract, diagnostic queue, diagnostic skill or diagnostic schema changes
Knowledge source, note, synthesis, workflow, eval or catalog-facing content changes
Review system contract, review queue, review skill, review docs map or review schema changes
New or upgraded stable system module activation changes
Agent, skill, module baseline doc, child-agent doc or subsystem README entrypoint changes

module_layer_model.role: derived owner_layer/module_kind snapshot, not the full topology decision brain

system_structure_governance.contract: 新增稳定模块、子系统、分支或跨模块关系前，先由 system-structure-governance 形成结构判断；module-governance 负责把判断登记成路由、存储、文档、闭环、可视化和校验契约。
system_structure_governance.legacy_responsibility_rule: system-structure-governance 的结构判断必须覆盖既有资产；module-governance 负责把 legacy_asset_audit 和 legacy_asset_action 登记进新模块契约。

module_activation_contract.rule: Registration is not activation. A new or upgraded stable system module is active only after activation_proof exists in system/system-closure-map.json and references legacy responsibility, topology, route, information-map, visual coverage and validation evidence.
required_when: new child or peer module under a system-governance branch
module promoted from draft or partial to current
module_activation_contract.acceptance_rule: No response, diagnostic acceptance, review acceptance or closure status may claim the module is active/effective before activation_proof passes validation.

thin_entrypoint_policy.purpose: Keep all agent, skill and module entry documents thin while preserving discoverability through machine routes and docs maps.
allowed_content: owner layer and module boundary summary
routed_content: schema field list or output template
thin_entrypoint_policy.routing_rule: When an entrypoint needs more than thin guidance, update the owning route, docs map, registry, schema or workflow and keep the entrypoint as a pointer.
thin_entrypoint_policy.internal_module_rule: The same boundary applies inside every module and subsystem; local README, skill or child-agent files cannot become hidden sources of system behavior.
